Brief Summary
Full stack developer with expertise in front-end and back-end development, also proficient in cloud deployments
using Azure and AWS. Experience in cross-functional collaboration to deliver a quality software product.

Frameworks:  React.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Express.js, RESTful APIs
Databases:  MySQL, MongoDB
Cloud/DevOps:  Azure, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Hadoop, PySpark
Concepts:  AI/ML, Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-oriented Programming, DBMS, Agile Development
